metadata.title: Socratink: The Dark Souls of EdTech Strategy
metadata.thesis: Socratink is a high-friction, high-truth learning engine that uses the 'Theta' neurocognitive mechanism and Lean Startup discipline to verify genuine mastery over passive recognition.
governing_assumptions: Generation Before Recognition: Attempting to recall a fact is the only way to genuinely encode it.
The Graph Tells the Truth: Mastery is not achieved through time spent, but through verified spaced retrieval.
Desirable Difficulty: Learning is most effective when it is challenging, as long as that challenge is perceived as fair.

backbone.principle: The Theta Mechanism: A three-phase node loop (Cold Attempt -> Study -> Spaced Re-drill) that leverages prediction errors to drive long-term memory formation.

subnodes.label: Prediction Error Generation
subnodes.mechanism: By forcing the learner to guess or explain a concept before seeing the answer, the brain generates a 'prediction error' signal. This signal primes the neural architecture to prioritize the incoming 'Corrective Study' data, leading to significantly stronger encoding than passive reading.

subnodes.label: Attribution Management
subnodes.mechanism: Because the Cold Attempt has a 95% failure rate, the UI must frame this failure as 'strategy data' rather than 'ability judgment.' If the learner views failure as progress (the 'Dark Souls' mindset), they persist; if they view it as incompetence, they 'go hollow' and quit.

subnodes.label: Truth-Bar Validation
subnodes.mechanism: The 'Socratink Brain' meta-layer audits drill transcripts to ensure the AI follows the 'Sparse Contract.' It detects 'Answer Leakage'—where the AI accidentally gives the solution—and marks those runs as 'Truth-Bar Violations' to prevent false mastery signaling in the graph.

subnodes.label: Build-Measure-Learn Loop
subnodes.mechanism: Every drill run is treated as a Lean Startup experiment. We 'Build' the drill, 'Measure' the telemetry (logs), and 'Learn' by updating the Socratink Brain Wiki. This prevents 'feature bloat' and keeps the engineering team focused on the 'Value Hypothesis' of truthful learning.

subnodes.label: The Spaced Re-drill Gate
subnodes.mechanism: A node only transitions to 'solidified' if the learner can reconstruct the mechanism from memory after a sufficient time buffer (spacing). This ensures the learner isn't just repeating a 'buffer echo' from the Study phase, but is retrieving from genuine long-term storage.

learning_prerequisites.rationale: One must understand why failure is necessary (Cold Attempt) before they can appreciate the need for an audit (Socratink Brain) to verify that failure was overcome truthfully.
An audited, truthful feedback loop is the prerequisite for achieving 'Solidified' status in the knowledge graph.
